codeReview.summary: Re-review after round 1 synthesis. The feature was NOT among the 6 failed features (memory-pattern-learning, mem-decay-function, mem-deprecation, mem-scoping, mem-triple-stream-retrieval, mem-cross-encoder-rerank). Implementation remains solid - conflict resolution module with MemoryConflictDetector, MemoryConflictResolver, ConflictResolutionService, and MemorySource priority system. All 19 tests pass, clippy passes.

issues.description: Dead code: ConflictMemoryInfo::outranks method is defined but never called anywhere in the codebase. The resolution strategies use direct comparison logic instead.
Unused field: ConflictResolutionConfig::same_generation_days is set in default() but never referenced in determine_conflict_type() or any other function.
MemorySource::outranks doesn't handle all combinations. Unknown outranks nothing and nothing outranks Unknown, which could cause edge cases if Unknown source memories are involved in conflicts.

sharedStateObservations.observation: This feature was not flagged in the round 1 synthesis blocking issues. No changes were made to this feature since the original review. The original review identified three non-blocking issues (dead code, unused field, incomplete outranks handling) which remain unfixed but do not block functionality.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: synthesis.json shows 6 failed features, mem-conflict-resolution is not among them. No new commits to this file since 26af0db.

summary: PASS - Re-confirmed after round 1 synthesis. The mem-conflict-resolution feature was not among the failed features. Implementation remains complete with all 19 tests passing and clippy clean. Three non-blocking issues from original review remain but are cosmetic/dead code - they do not affect core functionality.
